channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.description:

item.title: 327-349 Grafton road, 23rd May
item.description:
These trees are over grown they are inches from parked cars and are blocking the street light and road signage
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 351-367, Grafton Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Overhanging trees, 23rd May
item.description:
Obstructing light and getting to close to property

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mill Vale, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandonded vehicle with no MOT, 23rd May
item.description:
Car was parked up on the 18th May, after checking this is the date the cars MOT ran out. Owner doesn't live here and parking spaces are limited. No MOT = no tax so ideally need the owner contacted or vehicle removed. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thirlmere Rise, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden shelves etc on end of Seal Street E8 (by Shacklewell Row end), 23rd May
item.description:
Hello, please can you remove the dumped wooden shelves on Seal Street E8 (by Shacklewell Row end). Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Seal Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 20st Julian’s road, 23rd May
item.description:
Every year the neighbour lets this bush grow out of control and it blocks access to our property. Can you please remove this plant for good? It’s beginning to encroach onto our side and soon will block access to the property. The neighbour doesn’t care about us. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Julians Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chartwell Business Centre, Widmore, Greater London

item.title: Large suitvase open with rubbish falling out on Shacklewell Row by Seal Street, 23rd May
item.description:

item.title: Uneven pavement causing trip hazard, 23rd May
item.description:
This piece of pavement has been uneven and faulty for a number of months. It was marked by white lines as though it was going to be repaired but didn't happen.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park End, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clutter in Blandford court 1st floor walkway and stairs, 23rd May
item.description:
People gathering, spreading clutter, gathering, leaving food and liquids, personal items as if living there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Peters Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
